Index Scan using pg_type_typname_nsp_index on pg_catalog.pg_type t  (cost=0.16..8.20 rows=1 width=4) (actual time=0.043..0.044 rows=1.00 loops=1)
  Output: 1
  Index Cond: (t.typname = 'mchar'::name)
  Filter: pg_type_is_visible(t.oid)
  Index Searches: 1
  Buffers: shared hit=10
Query Identifier: -4248150014066157332
Planning:
  Buffers: shared hit=12
Planning Time: 0.209 ms
Execution Time: 0.065 ms
